reviews.title: Waited a year of use before my review
reviews.text: To be honest I only bought these shoes from the way they looked (Camo) and only after watching a few viedeos on them.. the price is great.. the comfort is surprising and easy to wear. I weith right at 300 lbs and they support me just fine.. now know I also own Brooks, NB, Adidas, UA HOVR, etc... shoes as well.. are these as comfortable as they are.. No.. but they sure pack a punch bang for the buck thought.. NOW.. One huge issue.;. and again I wanted to wait and see if the soles "scuffed up: for traction.. but no.. If there is rain.. and the water on any surface is thin.. like tile, ocncrete, wood or anything besices most asphalt.. this shoe is like your walking on thin ice.. and YOU WILL SKID! Be warned.. Good.. but Dry use ONLY

reviews.title: COMFORT
reviews.text: I LOVE THIS SHOE DUE TO THE FACT I HAD HARDWARE INSTALLED INTO MY RIGHT FOOT BECAUSE MY TOES HAVE COLLAPSED FROM RHEUMATOID ARTHRITIS .... THE ORTHOPEADIC DOCTOR RECOMMEND THIS BRAND ( RUNNING SHOE) SINCE I WORK ON CONCRETE FLOORS ..... THIS SHOE HELPS A GREAT DEAL FOR ME AND I HOPE IT HELPS SOMEONE ELSE GOING THROUGH THE SAME THING .... ALL THESE DIFFERENT KINDS OF GYM SHOES I BOUGHT AND NOTHING WORKS TIL THE DOCTOR RECOMMEND THIS BRAND OF SHOE. I'M NOT GETTING PAID TO SAY THIS, BUT I WILL SAY, IF YOU WERE IN MY POSITION TRYING TO FIND COMFORT AFTER SPENDING $$$$ FOR SEVERAL DIFFERENT TYPES OF GYM SHOES AND SOMEONE RECOMMEND A CERTAIN BRAND COMPARED TO ALL THE $$$$ YOU SPENT PRIOR .... I WISH I COULD GET MY MONEY BACK ON EVERY F*****  SINGLE (18) PAIR OF SHOES I PURCHASED ... FROM NOW ON THIS IS MY ONLY GYM SHOE I'LL WEAR FOR NOW ON.... LOVE THE COMFORT, WIDTH, AND I'M ABLE TO WALK MORE THAN 1 MILE WITHOUT HAVING TO STOP BECAUSE MY FEET ARE HURTING DUE TO THE CHRONIC  (RA) CONDITION LIFE THROWN AT ME.  LOVE LOVE LOVE THESE SHOES

reviews.title: Had to get used to them
reviews.text: I love this brand of Nike. I have been wearing this Nike Zoom Vomero for years. It has changed over the years. This shoe at first seemed to tight. I had to loosen the laces. After warring them for about a month they fit fine. One thing that bothers me is they squeak when I walk.

reviews.title: Perfect in every way!
reviews.text: I went to the nike store to measure the curve of my foot and width prior to purchasing these shoes. I am relatively flatfooted and needed good arch support. These were the most fitting option and they were right! I absolutely love these shoes! Nike didn't have these in store at the time so I purchased online. Absolutely adore these shoes. Perfect color - goes along the black I usually wear on a daily basis to school. I generally wear them all day before and after gym. Love love love them!

I did return them due to the size.

reviews.title: Enjoying walking again
reviews.text: I'm a size 10.5 on one foot and just barely over a 10 on the other foot. These fit well and work for both feet. I walk 1 to 2 miles a day and was having intense pain in my shins and feet. I did some research and ended up chosing this pair. While these shoes have not gotten rid of all the pain, they have alleviated most of it. It makes me confident that most of the pain from walking was in having the wrong footwear.

reviews.title: TREAT IT LIKE A SOCK
reviews.text:
PROS: Lightweight; very soft rubber soles (I would say strictly intended for inside use if you want them to last); and extremely comfortable.
CONS: Laces are too long (I replaced with "Lock Laces"); there's a learning curve to putting them on so as to avoid pulled muscles, damaged back, dislocated shoulder. Think about how you put on socks, then practice. These are not "shoes."

reviews.title: Very nice comfortable shoes

reviews.title: It's okay!
reviews.text:
These are based off the famous shoe from the other brand , it rhymes with Beezy450, which costs $100s of dollars! They are just a sock mesh put into a mold, where hot rubber is poured into the bottom which makes the sole. Put in a soft insole and boom, you got a foam runner shoe. Well these shoes are the same thing as the big brand, just without any logos.
The fit is not good for wide feet. They are only good for narrow and normal. If your feet is identical to the mold that they use for generic sizes, then it will fit you perfect and be very comfortable.
These are casual shoes and won't be great for dedicated sports like basketball or cross-country. 5-stars for being a great alternative to big name brands and for being very affordable. I can't think of anything bad to say about this shoe.

reviews.title: Love them

reviews.title: My First Pair of Slip On Sneakers
reviews.text:
I own more pairs of shoes right now that at any time in my life. Part of the reason is because I am involved in more activities than I was in the past and I am thus in need of more types of shoes. My desire to diversify further led me to get my feet inside a pair of INZCOU Men's Non-Slip Gym Sneakers.

I’ve owned lots of pairs of sneakers, but this is the first time I have owned sneakers that do not have a tongue. Instead, these shoes are slip- on and that makes them a little easier to put on because you don’t have to reach down and pull the tongue out, like you commonly do with other shoes. Once they are slipped into place, you tie and are ready to go.

These shoes fit about as expected. The only small issue I had was with the arch support in one of the shoes- it seemed a little off and it hurt at first. But after walking around for a while, everything is fine now. And since these are the first pair of black sneakers I have ever owned, they match up nicely with my darker jeans. It’s a welcome change from the white sneakers I usually wear.

It’s good to have a variety of shoes and INZCOU sneakers have proven a good addition to my collection. I will still wear traditional sneakers, the type that doesn’t slip on. But I am happy to add this set of sneakers to my growing supply.

title: New Balance Women's Fresh Foam Roav V1 Running Shoe
description: The impressive New Balance Fresh Foam Roav running shoes are loaded with built-in technology to make your day more enjoyable. The midsole features Fresh Foam cushioning which provides a feeling of plush comfort while remaining lightweight. NDurance technology makes the rubber outsole more durable so you can wear these shoes whether you're strutting on the sidewalk or jogging off-road. Finally, the Ultra Heel is strategically-designed to hug the back of your foot for a more supportive fit. These workout shoes are designed with your comfort in mind. The neutral cushioned running shoes hug your foot in its natural position to provide a lightly supported ride. Each element of the shoe's design is thoughtfully selected to ensure your feet are happy after daily wear. Made with a synthetic/mesh upper, these athletic shoes offer effortless wear and style. The bootie construction allows for easy on-and-off, while the stretch webbing offers even more comfort and a customized fit. These breathable shoes are here to support you through each stride, lift, squat or stretch. Weather you're exploring the city, hitting the gym or running a quick mile, opt for a shoe that keeps your foot supported while providing a cloud-like ride.
features: 100% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole

Truly Unique: The New Balance Fresh Foam Roav v1 running shoes are the ultimate in casual athletic style. Pairing a bold, attractive look with plush comfort, these cushioned running shoes are in a league of their own.

Fresh Foam Midsole: Feel like you're running or walking in the clouds. The first of three proprietary technologies in this athletic shoe, Fresh Foam midsole cushioning is precision engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride.

NDurance Outsole: Step up your game without wearing out your favorite running shoes. Ndurance rubber outsole technology provides superior durability in high-wear areas to help get more out of the shoes.

Ultra Heel: These neutral running shoes boast a head-turning heel that performs as well as it looks. The Ultra Heel design hugs the back of the foot for a snug, supportive fit. This unique heel works alongside the bootie upper for all-day comfort.
8mm Drop: These lightweight shoes feature a heel-to-toe drop of approximately 8mm. Due to variances created during development and manufacturing processes, references to 8mm are approximate.

reviews.title: Beyond comfortable
reviews.text: I love everything about these shoes. I bought them as a walking shoe to wear during our cruise. I actually wore them during our stop in San Juan. We walked over 25,000 steps in San Juan on a self walking tour and these were beyond comfortable. My feet felt great all day wearing them, I never had a problem with them pinching or rubbing my heels. New balance makes some of the best running shoes (in my opinion) and these Roav's did not disappoint. I will be buying additional pairs in other colors.

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 4 Running Shoes
description:
The gt-2000 4 is the core runner’s bread and butter with its balance of cushioning and stability, outfitted by the comfortably supportive dynamic duomax and guidance trusstic system that also enhance gait efficiency. Our rear foot and forefoot gel cushioning systems are now even more adaptive, assisting mild to moderate over pronators alike with greater support, while the fluid ride midsole offers the ultimate ride.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Impact Guidance System (I.G.S): ASICS design philosophy that employs linked componentry to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike to toe-off.
Dynamic duomax Support System: This evolution of duomax system enhances stability and support, with reduced weight and increased platform support.
Rear foot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Fluid ride: fluid ride provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Guidance Truss tic System: This Truss tic System integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

reviews.title: Great shoe for an over-pronator like me
reviews.text: I've used the GT-2000 shoes over the last few years and have yet to have issue with them. I over-pronate pretty badly and this shoe offers great support for that issue; My knees thank me. I found the shoe to fit exactly true to size and for those reviews that say it's small, people tend to forget that your feet swell when you run, especially longer distances! My personal size foot is between a 6.5-7 and I typically wear a 7 shoe for running, dress, or sandals. I can't say I know the difference between the GT-2000 model numbers (1-5?) except for new-ness. I have no issue with wearing older models and like the cheaper prices. For reference, I run half marathons several times a year on city sidewalks, asphalt, dirt roads, and dirt trails.

reviews.title: This was a gift. Didn't fit. So, ...
reviews.text: This was a gift. Didn't fit. So, hearsay- I am not sure of the exact fit. They are exchanging for a bigger size though.

reviews.title: Great shoe but runs small
reviews.text: Great shoe, very supportive in the arch and heel. I love the bright colors of the Asics shoes. The only thing I would be leary of is the size of the shoe. It runs small. I wear an 8 and because of other reviews, bought a 8-1/2. They fit but are still a little snug. After wearing for a bit, they will loosen up enough to be great. If you have a wider foot, you may not like these particular shoes.

reviews.title: Color in photo is not quite accurate
reviews.text: Have always loved my Asics GT-2000.  32 marathons and our relationship continues!  My only comment about this particular color combo is the photo appears to be grey and more coral color.  When they arrived what looks like a coral color in the photo is closer to fluorescent orange!  They are a bit "loud".  If they had been full price I probably would not have chosen them because of this.  Too "loud" for my preferences.  However, given the clearance price I'll make do!  :)

title: ASICS Men's Dynablast Running Shoes
description: The DYNABLAST shoe is recommended for runners who want a responsive underfoot experience during their run. This running shoe comfortably wraps around the foot like a gentle hug. This design features a lightweight and breathable upper to keep feet cool without forgoing support. Additionally, the shoe's upper is made with recycled materials, while the sockliner is produced with a solution dyeing process that reduces carbon emissions and water usage. Equipped with FLYTEFOAM Blast cushioning in the midsole to generate soft landings, this material is also complemented with underfoot cutouts in the outsole to provide runners with a more responsive toe-off.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rubber sole
FLYTEFOAM BLAST: Lightweight, midsole foam with energetic and highly responsive cushioning and bounce for an efficient ride.
Knit upper:
Solid Rubber Outsole: Provides enhanced durability and traction.
Underfoot cutouts provide excellent bounce:
EVA Sockliner: Removable sockliner that provides cushioning performance.

reviews.title: Very lightweight and comfortable
reviews.text: Like color and comfort

reviews.title: Dyna and Nova both a Blast.
reviews.text: I had put 700 miles on my Novablast this year and wanted to tell you they held up great even through many runs in snow and rain. I found the Nova well cushioned,nice tongue, wide toe box, firm mid,, but  unstable on camber and turns and a touch heavy.. The dyna I recently purchased feel lighter, good heel cushion, thinner tongue and nice toe drop. I really like both models of ASIC.  Perfect for me at 36 miles a week.

reviews.title: Love the color
reviews.text: While too soft for me to use as a running shoe I do love the snazzy color and I get a lot of compliments on the looks.

title: Klitch Footwear Clip Sports Accessory, Hang Extra Shoes Cleats Boots or Gear on Your Bag. Works on Soccer, Baseball, Basketball, Track, Running Shoes, Flip Flops and More.
description: The Klitch is a footwear clip that allows you to hang extra sneakers or cleats to the outside of your bag. This avoids getting the inside of your bag dirty, smelly, and full. Great for anyone who plays sports, works out, or has an active lifestyle. The Klitch can be used for any type of footwear up to 10 lbs!
features: PATENTED: The Klitch Footwear Clip allows you to carry extra shoes outside your bag allowing your shoes to air out and the contents of your bag to stay clean and fresh!
QUICK & EASY: No more messy and difficult knots to tie or untie. Quickly and easily clamp and clip extra shoes or equipment to your bag with no fuss!
PERFECT FOR SPORTS: Great for soccer cleats, football cleats, baseball spikes, basketball shoes, track shoes, hiking boots, flip-flops and much more!
ON THE GO: Great for traveling, hiking, camping or organizing at home. Hang extra shoes or equipment in your garage, lockers, tents or shoe racks!
CUSTOMER FIRST: The Klitch Footwear Clip includes a 1-year full replacement when purchased through Klitch!

reviews.title: Great for Volleyball Shoes
reviews.text:
Absolutly love it ... hold volleyball shoes on the outside of the bag ... if there was an update to the design it would be to make a clip open wide enough so shoes could go heel to heel to keep dirt or elements together.

If you looking for a clip to hold shoes on the outside of the bag -- Look No Further - THIS IS IT!

title: Saucony Unisex-Adult Excursion TR11 Running Shoe
description: Great traction and rugged protection around the foot make the excursion TR11 ready to tackle the trails. With an updated knit mesh design it keeps out debris while being comfortable and wearable for all day use.
features: Rubber sole
8mm - cushioning is distributed more evenly between the heel and forefoot in shoes with an 8mm offset, the result? Your body stays in a more balanced and comfortable position with every foot strike
XT-600 carbon rubber - outsole provides traction and durability
Cushioning - the underfoot feel and amount of impact protection provided by the compressing materials between the foot and running surface
Support - the level of pronation control built into the shoe, pronation is the inward rolling of the ankle through the gait cycle
Offset - the difference in height between the heel thickness and forefoot thickness of the shoe

reviews.title: Great buy

reviews.title: A winner
reviews.text: Great for walking/hiking on and off road.  Breathable, yet not to much sand gets in.  Fit nicely on my sensitive feet.  Good tread for off road.  Seems to stay clean.

reviews.title: Quality and supportive
reviews.text: These fit my son perfectly. Got a 12. He's usually a 11- 11 1/2, so definitely size up a bit. He has quite a bit of foot/knee/joint pain and these help immensely. However we do replace the shoe insoles with something more supportive, but usually nothing more than 20ish in cost.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: I'm not a runner or athletic but I'm so glad to find sneakers that cradle my feet in comfort perfectly.

reviews.title: Five Stars
